title: DAIMO: An Ontology for Governed AI Model Assets in Dataspaces
description: DAIMO is an OWL 2 DL integration profile connecting DCAT-AP, MLDCAT-AP 3.0.0, ODRL 2.2, PROV-O, and the Dataspace Protocol. It treats AI models as first-class governed assets in dataspaces, covering publication, discovery, invocation, execution traceability, and contextualised evaluation across participant boundaries. This release bundles the ontology specification (Turtle, OWL/XML, JSON-LD, N-Triples), SHACL shapes (including six cross-class invariants), a running-scenario example knowledge graph, 23 SPARQL-bound competency questions, a positive validator and a negative-test harness, WIDOCO-generated HTML documentation, and the ORSD. Validation reports from SHACL, HermiT, OWL-RL, OOPS!, and the entailment-verification check are included. Release tag: v0.1.6-swj-submission.
